inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of substance undergoing phase change

inputs.label: Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the substance (e.g., water: 4180 J/(kg·K))

inputs.label: Initial Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Starting temperature of the substance, must be ≤ melting point

inputs.label: Melting Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Melting point of the substance (e.g., ice: 0°C)

inputs.label: Latent Heat of Fusion
inputs.businessContext: Energy per unit mass to change phase from solid to liquid (e.g., water: 334 kJ/kg)
